# [MYXML](https://djoezeke.github.io/myxml) [ SECURITY POLICY ]

> **Note**: this policy is new and untested.
> We’ll update and polish it as we’re receiving security issues.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of our project seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability, we appreciate your help in disclosing it to us in a responsible manner.

When reporting, please include:

- A clear and concise description of the vulnerability.
- Steps to reproduce the vulnerability.
- Any potential impact or exploit scenarios.
- If applicable, details about the environment where the vulnerability was discovered (e.g., operating system, browser, software versions).
